potential_missing.source_sentence: Once they are done or the time is over, they submit it.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow users to register or log in with their details.
The system shall allow teachers to save a quiz as a draft or post it for students after working on it.
The system shall allow students to answer the selected quiz.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, the user may continue as a teacher or as a student.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow users to continue as a teacher or a student after logging in.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user continues as a teacher, they can create a new quiz or edit an existing one.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow teachers to create a new quiz or edit an existing one.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After working on the quiz, they can save it as a draft or post it for students.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow teachers to save a quiz as a draft or post it for students after working on it.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the quiz is over, the teacher can view the result.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow teachers to view quiz results once the quiz is over.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user continues as a student, they first select a quiz after getting notified.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow students to select a quiz after getting notified if they continue as a student.
The system shall allow students to answer the selected quiz.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Once they are done or the time is over, they submit it.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow students to submit their quiz after answering.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After submission, they can see the result and may also give feedback.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow students to view the result after submitting the quiz.
